title: Investigation of pathogenesis of hyperuricemia based on untargeted and targeted metabolomics.
author: Qin N Qin M Shi W Kong L Wang L Xu G Guo Y Zhang J Ma Q
content: S-EPMC9386008 PMC9386008 Investigation of pathogenesis of hyperuricemia based on untargeted and targeted metabolomics.
